# Create mobile capture screen

Read:

- docs/active/current-plan.md
- docs/active/current-task.md
- docs/reference/architecture.md
- docs/reference/api-contract.md
- .github/copilot-instructions.md

We are working only on the mobile app unless backend contract changes are required.

Task:
Create the first Expo screen for capturing an image and collecting item metadata.

Before editing files:

1. List the files you will change
2. Give the exact implementation plan
3. State any assumptions
4. Identify any packages that must already exist or be installed

Rules:

- Keep the UI simple
- Use TypeScript
- Use one screen only
- Do not add navigation unless requested
- Do not add state libraries
- Keep the form easy to understand and easy to test

After approval:

- Implement only the agreed changes
- Explain how to run and test the screen
- Suggest a commit message
